comments.body: I think you have to drop commit 2c42e3164a095ce86758682812dba65408d80f06 or add https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11709

Changes LGTM, fingers crossed for happy tests.  
I'm assuming you're good with adding this to RHEL 8.5.0.2 @mheon?
